# Onboarding: REST API Runtime Quality Skill
This skill helps you improve runtime quality for ASP.NET Core APIs (validation, error handling, testing).
## Quickstart Checklist
1. Read SKILL.md for runtime quality patterns.
2. Use tools in tools/ for validation and testing (e.g. dotnet test, Postman).
3. See examples/README.md for runtime checks.
## Troubleshooting
- **Tests fail or errors inconsistent?**
- Check validation logic and error contracts.
